title: Lifewit Cutlery Drawer Organiser with Lid, Plastic Small Cutlery Tray for Kitchen Drawer, Utensil Flatware Silverware Holder Divider for Spoons Forks Knives Tableware, 5 Compartment, Black
features: Dust-Free Storage: Our cutlery drawer organiser boasts a transparent lid that effectively shields your cutlery from dirt and moisture, ensuring it ready for use. The lid's clarity allows for quick visual checks and it can be fully removed for easy cleaning

5 Compartments for Sorting: This cutlery tray features five compartments that are perfect for storing spoons, forks, knives, and utensils. It keeps your items neatly arranged and accessible, making it easy to find what you need

Fits Most Drawers: Our cutlery organiser measures 12.7 x 9.3 x 1.7 inches (32.3 x 23.5 x 4.3 cm), fitting effortlessly into most kitchen drawers while providing ample storage space. The ergonomic groove design ensures easy removal of your silverware

Portable Design: This utensil drawer organiser can store not only kitchenware but also stationery, cosmetics and small gadgets. The snug lid and compact size make it convenient for various occasions, including home gatherings, picnics, camping and so on

Safe PP Material: Crafted from sturdy food-grade PP material, our cutlery trays for kitchen drawers withstand daily wear and tear. It is BPA-free, ensuring the safety of all types of cutlery. Cleaning is a breeze - simply rinse with water to remove stains

Highlights and Advantages Fit Most Drawers Our cutlery drawer organiser measures 12.7" x 9.3" x 1.7" (32.3 x 23.5 x 4.3 cm). It fits perfectly in most kitchen drawers, providing 5 compartments for easy sorting and storage of cutlery and utensils. Safe PP Material Crafted from premium food-grade PP material, our cutlery organiser is built to withstand the rigors of daily use. It is certified BPA-free, ensuring the safety of all your tableware. Groove Design With carefully crafted grooves, our cutlery tray offers a secure grip on utensils, ensuring safety and convenience during use. Easy to Clean Cleaning our organiser is a breeze. Simply rinse it under running water, wipe it dry with a cloth, and avoid using a dishwasher. Previous page Explore More Utensil Organisers Need a matching utensil organiser?
